code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_AuthVault] --> Initializing: App starts

    Initializing --> Loading: Load cached notifications
    Loading --> Subscribing: Cache loaded
    Loading --> Error: Load failed

    Subscribing --> Active: Subscriptions ready
    Subscribing --> Error: Subscription failed

    Active --> Active: New notification arrives
    Active --> Processing: User interaction
    Active --> Updating: Mark as read

    Processing --> Active: Interaction complete
    Updating --> Active: Update complete

    Active --> Cleanup: 30 days passed
    Cleanup --> Active: Old notifications removed

    Error --> Retrying: Retry after delay
    Retrying --> Subscribing: Retry attempt
    Retrying --> Failed: Max retries reached

    Failed --> [FinTech_AuthVault]: Unrecoverable error

    state Active {FinTech_LedgerService] --> Unread
        Unread --> Read: Mark as read
        Read --> Archived: Archive
        Archived --> Deleted: Delete
        Deleted --> [FinTech_AuthVault]
    }

    note right of Active
        Notification lifecycle:
        - Arrives as Unread
        - User marks as Read
        - Auto-archived after 7 days
        - Deleted after 30 days
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个FinTech AuthVault的通知中心状态图。核心流程是：应用启动后先Initializing，然后Loading缓存的通知，成功后进入Subscribing订阅服务，最后到Active状态。Active里面还要细分Unread、Read、Archived、Deleted四个子状态。
明白了，Active是一个复合状态。那Loading到Subscribing的条件是"Cache loaded"，但如果缓存加载失败呢？需要处理Error分支吗？
对，Loading失败要进Error状态。另外Subscribing也可能失败进Error。Error之后要Retrying，重试成功回到Subscribing，失败次数超限就进Failed，最终回到FinTech_AuthVault结束。
好的，我先把主流程和错误处理画出来。Active内部的状态转换是：Unread标记为Read，然后7天后自动Archived，再30天后Deleted？
等等，Archived到Deleted是30天，但Active到Cleanup也是30天，这里有点混淆。Cleanup是清理旧通知后回到Active，而Deleted是最终销毁。另外Active里还要有Processing和Updating两个临时状态，处理用户交互和标记已读。
清楚了，Processing和Updating都是临时状态，完成后回到Active。Cleanup是Active的并行清理机制，30天触发一次。我在Active右边加个注释说明完整生命周期：Unread→Read→Archived→Deleted。
还有一点，Active状态内部要显示FinTech_LedgerService连接到Unread，表示通知来源。另外Active自身有个自循环：New notification arrives，表示新通知到达。
全部完成了。检查一下：从FinTech_AuthVault启动，经过Initializing、Loading、Subscribing到Active，内部有LedgerService接入Unread，支持新通知到达的自循环，以及Processing、Updating、Cleanup等转换，错误处理通过Retrying最终可能到Failed结束。注释也加上了。
